steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states tribal economic activity contributed over $141,000 per employee on average. The correct choice must place that figure accurately relative to the other sectors shown in the data.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — tribal figure above all three sectors: would require tribal output to exceed transportation/warehousing — not supported by 'over $141,000' if transportation/warehousing is higher. ✗
  • Choice B — below transportation/warehousing but above manufacturing and health care: places tribal output between those values, consistent with the over $141,000 figure. ✓
  • Choice C — tribal figure below all three sectors: contradicted by the over $141,000 figure exceeding manufacturing and health care. ✗
  • Choice D — nearly equal to transportation/warehousing: the data places it clearly below transportation/warehousing, not nearly equal. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
